ops.title: Fix Skill(codex) fork-relay mechanism (codex plugin v0.10.0: drop context:fork, run inline; $$-unique temp paths; user-scope install)

ops.text: codex plugin 0.10.0 pushed and installed; regression workflow of schema-bound subagents invoking Skill(codex) returns 0 'Skill execution completed' stubs (baseline 15/18); codex:codex-wrapper agent + codex skill available in a fresh session in a non-cc-skills repo
